strengths: ~20 years of polyglot engineering experience across web, embedded, infrastructure, and data-intensive systems demonstrates the broad technical depth the role demands
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq shows direct, hands-on engagement with agentic AI tooling at the time this role was posted
Founder-track record with GISCollective plus early-stage company experience (WatchUp, RIDE, Apon) evidences the entrepreneurial disposition the role explicitly prefers
concerns: Holds only bachelor's degrees with no postgraduate AI credentials, falling short of the preferred Master's/PhD in an AI-related field for a director-level IC role
No demonstrated experience advising strategic customers or partners at an executive or enterprise level — the role requires external thought leadership, not just technical contribution
Cloud platform expertise is narrow (AWS CDK at Optilyz); there is no evidence of designing or operating cloud infrastructure at the scale or strategic depth the role centers on
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical breadth and recent, relevant AI-agent infrastructure work, which partially satisfies the builder fluency the role requires; however, the position is a director-level IC expected to advise enterprise customers, shape cloud-AI product strategy, and carry recognized external authority in AI — none of which are evidenced in the resume. The absence of advanced AI education and any enterprise-facing strategic or advisory experience represents a significant gap against the stated requirements at this seniority level.
